params.name: Louis XIV Portrait
params.description:
On October 28, 1701, Rigaud created this portrait of Louis XIV.
Louis XIV was the King of France of the Bourbon Dynasty and also the King of Navarre, reigning for 72 years. During his reign, France engaged in three major wars and became the powerhouse in Western Europe, earning him the title of the Sun King. This oil painting portrays the imposing manner of Louis XIV.
